modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty searching for study abroad programs at Gallagher Center.

full_description_text:  
I am having trouble finding study abroad programs through the Gallagher Center. When I try to search, I can't seem to locate the options available. It would be great to get some guidance on how to navigate this process.
